module.name: TCS/IDC/CBC
module.description: A specialized training program to resist Transnational Crime Syndicates (TCS), International Death Cults (IDC), and the Cabal of Banking Cartels (CBC), focusing on psychological warfare resistance, economic sovereignty, and counter-intelligence tactics.
